title: Rich Silky Adventurous Russian Hake Grill
description: A rich and silky hake dish with an adventurous twist, perfect for a dinner or special occasion featuring grilled flavors.

ingredients.name: 3 tbsp butter
ingredients.notes: ensure to use dairy-free alternative if needed

ingredients.name: 2 cups crème fraîche or vegan sour cream
ingredients.notes: add to reach desired consistency and richness

ingredients.name: 1 tsp Dijon mustard
ingredients.notes: classic Russian accompaniment with hake dishes

instructions: Preheat your grill or gas stove to medium-high heat.
Gently season the hake fillets with salt and pepper on both sides. If using, soften the butter by letting it sit at room temperature for a minute or two.
In a mixing bowl, combine softened butter, heavy cream, crème fraîche, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and chopped dill. Mix well until smooth and creamy.
Place hake fillets in a greased grill pan or on an oiled grill grate over medium-high heat. Once the grill is hot, place fillets skin-side down onto the grill.

Brush each side with some of the butter mixture, then top with the remaining mixture. Close the lid and cook for about 5-6 minutes per side or until cooked through (the internal temperature should reach at least 145°F).
Carefully remove fillets from the heat and let rest for a minute before slicing.
Serve hot over grill vegetables, if using, or on its own with a drizzle of extra butter or cream. Garnish with additional chopped dill if desired.
